title: System and method for understanding influencer reach within an augmented media intelligence ecosystem
abstract: Aspects of the present disclosure involve systems, methods, devices, and the like for augmented media intelligence using Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), Natural Language Processing (NLP), data analytics and data visualization. In one embodiment, a system is introduced that can retrieve real-time data from social media platforms to perform augmented media intelligence analysis and take real time actions if necessary. In another embodiment, the augmented media intelligence is design to use the machine learning and natural language processing capabilities and social currency means for understanding an influencers reach within the augmented media intelligence system via an influencer score.
claims: Claims What Is Claimed Is: 1. A system comprising: a non-transitory memory storing instructions; and a processor configured to execute instructions to cause the system to: in response to a determination that new data is available for processing, retrieve real-time digital data; classify the real-time digital data retrieved; extract, from the classified real-time data, influencer factors; calculate, using a combination of the real-time data retrieved and the influencer factors, an influencer score; generate, a performance metric and report using the influencer score and real- time data retrieved; and present, on an interactive user interface of the system, the performance metric and report generated. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein the influencer factors include at least one of engagement, publications, impressions, followers, and momentum. 3. The system of claim 1, executing instructions further causes the system to: correlate stories to determine a plan for engagement with an influencer, wherein the correlated stories are presented on the report generated. 4. The system of claim 1, wherein the influencer score is determined using a weighted average of the influencer factors. 5. The system of claim 1, wherein the performance metric and report includes an influencer identification number, the influener identification number providing a rank of an influencer. 6. The system of claim 5, wherein the performance metric and the report transmitted is personalized using a social currency of the influencer. 7. The system of claim 1, wherein the report includes regional map illustrating regions with maximum engagement. 8. A method comprising: in response to a determination that new data is available for processing, retrieving real-time digital data; classifying the real-time digital data retrieved; extracting, from the classified real-time data, influencer factors; calculating, using a combination of the real-time data retrieved and the influencer factors, an influencer score; generating, a performance metric and report using the influencer score and real-time data retrieved; and presenting, on an interactive user interface of the system, the performance metric and report generated. 9. The method of claim 8, wherein the influencer factors include at least one of engagement, publications, impressions, followers, and momentum. 10. The method of claim 8, further comprising: correlating stories to determine a plan for engagement with an influencer, wherein the correlated stories are presented on the report generated. 11. The method of claim 8, wherein the influencer score is determined using a weighted average of the influencer factors. 12. The method of claim 8, wherein the performance metric and report includes an influencer identification number, the influener identification number providing a rank of an influencer. 13. The method of claim 12, wherein the performance metric and the report transmitted is personalized using a social currency of the influencer. 14. The method of claim 8, wherein the report includes regional map illustrating regions with maximum engagement. 15. A non-transitory machine readable medium having stored thereon machine readable instructions executable to cause a machine to perform operations comprising: in response to a determination that new data is available for processing, retrieving real-time digital data; classifying the real-time digital data retrieved; extracting, from the classified real-time data, influencer factors; calculating, using a combination of the real-time data retrieved and the influencer factors, an influencer score; generating, a performance metric and report using the influencer score and real-time data retrieved; and presenting, on an interactive user interface of the system, the performance metric and report generated. 16. The non-transitory medium of claim 15, wherein the influencer factors include at least one of engagement, publications, impressions, followers, and momentum. 17. The non-transitory medium of claim 15, further comprising: correlating stories to determine a plan for engagement with an influencer, wherein the correlated stories are presented on the report generated. 18. The non-transitory medium of claim 15, wherein the influencer score is determined using a weighted average of the influencer factors. 19. The non-transitory medium of claim 15, wherein the performance metric and report includes an influencer identification number, the influener identification number providing a rank of an influencer. 20. The non-transitory medium of claim 19, wherein the performance metric and the report transmitted is personalized using a social currency of the influencer.
